design_philosophy: A playful, high-energy, quirky aesthetic perfect for Gen Z and meme creators. We are combining soft pastel background colors with aggressive, hard 2px black borders and solid drop shadows (Neo-Brutalism) to give the application a 'fun, ridiculous' vibe suited for dogs singing rap songs. Emphasize large typography, stark contrasts, and chunky UI elements.

rules: Never use soft, blurred shadows. All shadows MUST be solid color offsets (e.g., box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #0A0A0A).
Use bold 2px or 3px solid black borders on all interactive elements, cards, and containers.
Hover states should translate the element slightly (e.g., -translate-x-1 -translate-y-1) and increase the solid shadow offset.
Headings should be massive, bold, and often uppercase to mimic a music video poster.
Use Bricolage Grotesque for an expressive, slightly chaotic but readable neo-brutalist feel.
Ensure extremely high contrast: text is almost always #0A0A0A.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Leave negative space around the video player and forms. Don't center everything perfectly; use slight asymmetry for a quirky look.
Embrace 'cardless' looks for text, but heavy 'cards' for functional units like the video generator and upload zones.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFB6C1] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all font-bold px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-[#98FB98] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] p-6 md:p-8 rounded-none

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] px-4 py-3 text-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#FFB6C1] transition-shadow rounded-none
inputs.upload_zone: border-4 border-dashed border-[#0A0A0A] bg-[#E0F2FE] p-12 text-center cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#87CEEB] transition-colors shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A]

tags_and_badges.default: px-3 py-1 bg-[#FFD700] border border-[#0A0A0A] text-xs font-bold uppercase

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements should 'press down' (translate X and Y) and reduce shadow offset, simulating a physical mechanical button press.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast and snappy transitions (duration-150 ease-out). No slow fades.
motion_and_interaction.loading_states: Use marquee scrolling text (e.g., 'DROPPING BEATS... RAPPING...') inside a thick black border for loading states instead of standard spinners.

images.description: A cool brown dog wearing sunglasses on a blue background. Use as the main hero graphic or decorative element near the video generator.
A dog standing on a green background. Use as an accent image or inside a stylized frame.

rules: Wrap all images in thick 2px solid black borders.
If layering images, apply solid drop shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#0A0A0A]) to the image containers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a one-page SaaS dashboard for generating the dog rap videos.
Use a Neo-Brutalist design language. This means no rounded corners (or very small ones), solid black borders, and hard solid shadows.
Create a bold Hero section introducing the tool with massive typography.
Implement a prominent 'Upload Dog Photo' dropzone using the dashed border style.
Create a 'Song Selection' area (even if just displaying 'Big Booty Hoes by Gucci Mane' as the active track in a stylized cassette or music player UI component).
Include a large, chunky 'Generate Video' button.
Include a 'Video Preview' card where the generated Sora 2 video will be displayed. When empty, show a fun placeholder state.
Do not use generic gray loaders. Use a scrolling marquee or blocky loading text.
All components should use Tailwind classes to enforce the hard border + offset shadow look (e.g., border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
